sourcesContent:
import { useState } from 'react' const mockArticles = [ { id: 1, headline: "Global Markets Rally as Economic Indicators Show Strong Growth", subtitle: "Investors celebrate as major indices reach new heights in a surprising turn of events that has analysts rethinking their forecasts for the coming quarter.", category: "Economics", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1611974789855-9c2a0a7236a3?w=800&h=600&fit=crop", author: "Sarah Jenkins", time: "2 hours ago" }, { id: 2, headline: "Championship Final Set for Next Weekend", subtitle: "Top teams prepare for the ultimate showdown.", category: "Sports", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1574629810360-7efbbe195018?w=800&h=600&fit=crop", author: "Mike Ross", time: "4 hours ago" }, { id: 3, headline: "New Film Breaks Box Office Records", subtitle: "Audiences flock to theaters for latest blockbuster.", category: "Entertainment", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1489599849927-2ee91cede3ba?w=800&h=600&fit=crop", author: "Emily Chen", time: "5 hours ago" }, { id: 4, headline: "International Summit Addresses Climate Change", subtitle: "World leaders commit to ambitious new targets.", category: "International", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1611273426858-450d8e3c9fce?w=800&h=600&fit=crop", author: "David Miller", time: "6 hours ago" }, { id: 5, headline: "Tech Innovation Transforms Healthcare Industry", subtitle: "AI-powered solutions revolutionize patient care.", category: "Technology", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1559757148-5c350d0d3c56?w=800&h=600&fit=crop", author: "Jessica Wong", time: "8 hours ago" }, { id: 6, headline: "Cultural Festival Celebrates Local Heritage", subtitle: "Community comes together for annual celebration.", category: "Culture", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1514525253161-7a46d19cd819?w=800&h=600&fit=crop", author: "Tom Baker", time: "1 day ago" } ] export default function HeadlinesPage() { const [articles] = useState(mockArticles) // Main featured article (first one) const mainArticle = articles[0] // Side articles (next two) const sideArticles = articles.slice(1, 3) // Bottom articles (rest) const bottomArticles = articles.slice(3) return (
{/* Header Section */}

The Daily Headlines

Vol. CXXIV No. 42 {new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { weekday: 'long', year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' })} $2.00
{/* Main Grid Layout */}
{/* Left Column - Side Articles */}
{sideArticles.map((article) => (
{article.category}

{article.headline}

{article.subtitle}

))}
{/* Center Column - Main Feature */}
{mainArticle.category}

{mainArticle.headline}

{mainArticle.subtitle}

By {mainArticle.author} • {mainArticle.time}
{/* Right Column - More Articles (Stacked) */}
{/* Weather or Ad placeholder could go here, for now using another article style */}

Weather

72°F
Sunny & Clear
{bottomArticles.slice(0, 1).map((article) => (

{article.headline}

{article.subtitle}

{article.category}
))}
{/* Bottom Section - Two Side by Side */}
{bottomArticles.slice(1).map((article) => (
{article.category}

{article.headline}

{article.subtitle}

))}
) }
